content: The pending/done inbox split is the trigger mechanism for the behaviour tree. The agent checks if pending/ has files — that branch fires and triggers triage into Octowiki. The inbox sits in the 'urgent zone' at the top of the behaviour tree: `[inbox messages?] → Handle inbox (triage → Octowiki)`. This means inbox architecture decisions are not just file organisation — they directly shape the behaviour tree's control flow.

provenance.raw_agent: So the pending/done split isn't just a file organisation choice — it's the trigger mechanism for the behaviour tree. The agent checks pending/ exists and has files → that branch fires.
